---
title: "Heroes of Legend"
subtitle: "Core Rules, First Edition"
author: "Bruce A. Moser"
date: today
toc: false
---

::: {.centered}
_"Grab your swords. Stow your spell books. Adventure awaits."_

*Heroes of Legend*
:::

\newpage

<!-- Front matter content is in chapters/00-front-matter.qmd -->
